title: Critters and Companions
description: Adds a few new friends to your world!
body:
Critters and Companions is a vanilla-style creature mod that will fill the overworld with new animals!



**Current mobs:** - Otter: Spawns in rivers. Otters will open clams to find pearls - clams can be obtained by fishing in rivers. Pearls are used to craft the pearl necklace! - Ferret: Spawns in plains and forests and can be tamed with raw rabbit to help you hunt chickens and rabbits. Tamed ferrets can dig for loot after being fed raw chicken - 5 minute cooldown. - Koi fish: Spawns in rivers and can be picked up with a bucket. Groups of koi fish will give the player luck. - Dumbo octopus: Spawns in deep oceans and can be picked up with a bucket. When a player is drowning, nearby dumbo octopuses will help by giving them a bubble helmet. - Sea bunny: Spawns in oceans and can be picked up with a bucket. Sea bunny slime can be obtained with glass bottles and used to craft sea bunny slime blocks. - Dragonfly: Spawns over rivers, can be tamed with spider eyes. When tamed, dragonflies can be given dragonfly armour, crafted with ingots in a diagonal line of 3. - Leaf insect: Spawns in forests and dances to music :) - Red panda: Spawns in jungles and sleeps through the day. Breedable with bamboo, and tameable with sweet berries. When tamed, red pandas will scare away most aggressive neutral mobs! - Shima enaga: Spawns in snowy biomes, tameable with seeds. - Jumping spider: Tamed with dragonfly wings and will protect the player. Drops jumping spider silk, which can be used to craft the silk leash and silk grappling hook.


Josh/Joosh - Art
EterDelta - Coding the mod
Scratchy - Sound effects
Lytho_ - Fabric port


**** [**Creeper Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul) A mod which overhauls the vanilla creepers!

[**Golem Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/golem-overhaul) A mod which adds 9 new golem types!
[**Enderman Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul) A mod which overhauls the vanilla endermen!
[**Nightlights**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/nightlights) A mod that adds a variety of new light sources to Minecraft!
[**Lookin' sharp**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/lookin-sharp) Adding 60 new melee weapons to the game!
[**Ribbits**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ribbits) Ribbits adds new swamp villages, full of frog villagers!
